card.name: Abandonment of Will
card.text: Exile each creature with one or more creature types. For each creature exiled this way, its controller creates a 1/1 colorless creature token. (They have no creature types.)

card.name: Angel of Perseverance
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each each other creature you controls.

card.name: Angel of the Lost
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Blessing of Unity
card.text: Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. If you control three or more creatures, they also get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Candlebearer
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters, scry 1.

card.name: Compassion
card.text: Whenever one or more attacking creatures you control die, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Dedicated Insurgent
card.text: Martyr 1 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Deployed Husks
card.text: Create three 1/1 colorless creature tokens. (They have no creature types.)

card.name: Disarmament
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets an Aura or Equipment. Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: White Vanguard
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature defending player controls.

card.name: Dissenters' Wrath
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Dormancy
card.text: Enchant creature. Enchanted creature can't attack, block or be sacrificed.

card.name: Entity of Equilibrium
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of your upkeep, each player with the fewest or tied for the fewest cards in their hand each draw a card.

card.name: Fade Into Oblivion
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target creature with no creature types. • Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Forbiddance
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {2}. If that spell is countered this way, put it on top of its owner's library instead of into that player's graveyard.

card.name: Forsake
card.text: Exile target creature. Create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Glory, the Steadfast
card.text: When this creature enters or becomes a martyr, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Martyr 3 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Guide of the Forsaken
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Hallowed Slayer
card.text: Whenever Hallowed Slayer attacks, you may pay {1}{W}. If you do, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Howling Fledgeling
card.text: Flying

card.name: Impeccable Skill
card.text: Enchant creature When Impeccable Skill enters the battlefield, draw a card. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has vigilance.

card.name: Loyal Detainer
card.text: Flying {1}{W}, {T}: Tap target creature with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Mantra of Unity
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: On Patrol
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Purpose
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Rebellious Angel
card.text: Flying Martyr 3 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Regret, Vision's Demise
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile up to one target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 colorless creature token. Exile all cards from that player's graveyard. (The token has no creature types.)

card.name: Renegade Marshal
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Martyr 3 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Renowned Guardian
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one other target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Repressive Skyguard
card.text: Flying Whenever Repressive Skyguard attacks, exile up to one target card in a graveyard. If it's a creature card, Repressive Skyguard gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Resolute Dissenter
card.text: Martyr 2 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Stalwart Cleric
card.text: During your turn, this creature has lifelink. Martyr 2 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Inquisitor's Strike
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control an attacking creature. Inquisitor's Strike deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: The Pristine Overseer
card.text: Flying, vigilance As this creature enters, choose a card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated unless they're mana abilities.

card.name: Venerable Inquisitor
card.text: First strike Whenever a creature entering causes an ability to trigger, counter that ability unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Venerated Wings
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has flying, and is an Angel in addition to its other creature types.

card.name: Wayward Wanderer
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then shuffle.

card.name: Winged Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Flying This creature has lifelink if a creature entered the battlefield under your control this turn.

card.name: Abrogate
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. • Put up to one target creature on top of its owner's library.

card.name: Aether Tides
card.text: Choose four. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Tap target creature. • Put a stun counter on target creature

card.name: Magisterial Sphinx
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Augur of Tragedies
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Consult the Seers
card.text: If you have fewer than seven cards in hand, draw cards equal to the difference.

card.name: Devoted Seer
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Discerning Neverfolk
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Drag Through Time
card.text: Put target creature or creature spell on top of its owner's library.

card.name: Gliding Sage
card.text: Flash Flying

card.name: Herald of the Aether
card.text: Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may tap or untap target creature.

card.name: Obstructing Seer
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Omission of Reality
card.text: Return all nonland permanents to their owners' hands.

card.name: Library Sentry
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Anticipate
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Probe the Path
card.text: Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Neverfolk Loreseeker
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Neverfolk Sentinel
card.text: {2}{U}: Examine (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Neverfolk Stargazer
card.text: When this creature enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) The first spell you cast from exile each turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Peer into the Unknown
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an instant, sorcery or Weird card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Pensive, the Introspective
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant and sorcery from anywhere other than your hand, you may copy it. If you do you may choose new targets for the copy

card.name: Pin Down
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-0 until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Vision
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, draw a card if you follow the path. When this creature dies, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Seeker, a Spark Reborn
card.text: [+1]: Until your next turn, whenever one or more creatures attack you or a planeswalker your control, remove up to one attacking creature from combat. [0]: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other on the bottom of your library. [-6]: Reveal up to six cards you own from outside the game and put them into your hand.

card.name: Seer Detainer
card.text: When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Servant of Recurrence
card.text: Flying At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player returns a creature they control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Skybreacher
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Spell Capture
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. Scry 1.

card.name: Temporal Journey
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. During that turn you may look at the top card of your library anytime and play the top card of your library. Exile Temporal Journey.

card.name: The Prime Augur
card.text: Flash If you would draw one or more cards, instead scry X, where X is the number of cards you would draw, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Memory Lapse
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell is countered this way, put it on top of its owner's library instead of into that player's graveyard.

card.name: Tyrant of Depths
card.text: {4}{U}{U}: Tyrant of Depths can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Unravelling
card.text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Violation of Reason
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature becomes a blue Weird with base power and toughness 4/5.

card.name: Void Form
card.text: Target creature gains hexproof until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Wailing Oracle
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 1.

card.name: Winged Anomaly
card.text: Flying Winged Anomaly can block only creatures with flying.

card.name: Zestless
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and creature types, is colorless, and has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Abyssal Blade
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks or dies, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Angst
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card. {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Clandestine Thaumaturge
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you follow the path, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Dark Duality
card.text: Search your library for two cards with different names and reveal them. An opponent of your choice chooses one of them. Put that card into your graveyard and the other into your hand.

card.name: Deathshifter
card.text: Menace Deathshifter can't block You may cast Deathshifter from your graveyard by exiling another creature card from your graveyard in addition to paying its mana cost.

card.name: Dissenter's Companion
card.text: Menace Martyr 3 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Dissenter's Blow
card.text: Dissenter's Blow deals 2 damage to target creature. You gain 2 life if you control a creature.

card.name: Dread Bringer
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Shadowcaller
card.text: Menace Exile four cards from your graveyard: You follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Dread Renegade
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent loses 4 life. Martyr 4 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Anguish
card.text: Target opponent discards three cards. If fewer than three cards were discarded this way, you draw cards equal to the difference.

card.name: Expulsion of Identity
card.text: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead, then create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Fall of the Library
card.text: Each opponent chooses a card in their hand and discard the rest.

card.name: Flayed Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Foretold Findings
card.text: Scry 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Frightwing
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Guardian of the Abyss
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Menace When this creature enters, mill three cards, then you may return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Hallowed Caretaker
card.text: Flash Lifelink

card.name: Horrifying Visage
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has menace.

card.name: Dusk Prowlers
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Flash

card.name: Looming Sentry
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes a martyr, you draw a card and lose 1 life. Martyr 2 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Mantra of Resolve
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. • Draw a card. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Noxious Finality
card.text: Destroy target creature. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Oppress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a creature card from it. That player discards that card. You may exile a creature card from that player's graveyard.

card.name: Pulled from Beneath
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Reckless Swordmaster
card.text: This creature can't block. Martyr 2 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Resolve
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, if you follow the path, that player sacrifices a creature and discards a card. When this creature dies, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Ruthless Forsaker
card.text: If a creature an opponent controls with one or more creature types would die, instead exile it and create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types).

card.name: Scavenging Drake
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature or discard a creature card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Grasp of the Abyss
card.text: Creatures your opponents control get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Shadowsire
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Spite, the Relentless
card.text: Martyr 1 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to your hand.) When this creature dies, if it didn't become a martyr, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Thoughtspill
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a card with mana value 2 or 3 from it and exile that card.

card.name: Tortured Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, target opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Vicious Disfigurement
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: The Nomad's Strike
card.text: Destroy target creature with mana value 4 or less.

card.name: The Grand Forsaker
card.text: Creatures without creature types you control get +1/+1. {1}{B}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Sulking Magus
card.text: Martyr 2 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Strength of Resolve
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Steadfast Swordsman
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Afflatus
card.text: Draw three cards, then choose two cards at random from your hand. For each of them put it on the top or bottom of your library.

card.name: Aether Phoenix
card.text: Flying You may cast this card from your graveyard if you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn.

card.name: Augur Patrol
card.text: Haste

card.name: Blood Seer
card.text: When this creature enters, discard a card, then examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Blood Seer gets +1/+0 as long as you own two or more examined cards.

card.name: Claim of the Aether
card.text: The owner of target nonenchantment permanent an opponent controls shuffles it into their library. That player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a permanent card with a different name. They put that card onto the battlefield. Then that player shuffles.

card.name: Contemplate Chaos
card.text: Contemplate Chaos deals damage to target creature equal to the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard plus the number of Weirds you control.

card.name: Crimson Scourge
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, other attacking creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Drape in Blood
card.text: Drape in Blood deals 1 damage to each of two targets.

card.name: Entropic Blast
card.text: Entropic Blast deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent would die this turn, shuffle it into its owner's library instead.

card.name: Entropic Creation
card.text: Choose weird, whack or warp at random X times. When you choose weird make a 2/2 red Weird creature token. When you choose whack, Entropic Creation deals 2 damage to any target. When you choose warp, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Entropic Visionary
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage each opponent.

card.name: Erratic Spellweaver
card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile an instant and/or a sorcery card from your graveyard. For each you do, create a 2/2 red Weird creature token.

card.name: Fiery Oracle
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you have no cards in your hand, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Fracture
card.text: Fracture deals X damage to any target. If a creature or planeswalker dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Frontier Observer
card.text: Menace {1}{R}: Frontier Observer gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Seer's Charge
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Overwhelm
card.text: Target creature can't block this turn. Overwhelm deals 2 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: Mantra of Possibility
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Add {R}{R}. Until end of turn you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. • Discard your hand, then draw two cards.

card.name: Meandering Shrieker
card.text: Menace Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Possibility
card.text: When this creature enters, discard your hand, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you follow the path, this creature deals 3 damage to any target. When this creature dies, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Prophetic Hunter
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Ruthless Hunter
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 red Dog creature tokens. Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +X/+0 and gains trample until end of turn, where X is the number of attacking creatures you control.

card.name: Scrutinize
card.text: When this enchantment enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever you cast a spell from exile, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Searing Breath
card.text: Searing Breath deals 2 damage to any target. Scry 1.

card.name: Sedition
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Seek the Aether
card.text: Discard your hand, then examine seven times. (To examine, exile the top card of your library. You may cast it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Petitioner of the Past
card.text: When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Seer Attendant
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, discard a card, then examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Seer Swiftblade
card.text: First strike

card.name: Seize Opportunities
card.text: Kicker—Discard your hand. Exile the top five cards of your library, you may play them this turn. If this spell was kicked, add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Sentinel Seer
card.text: Reach {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Single Out
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Search the Grimoires
card.text: Discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Unravel the Strings
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Wizard creature tokens. You follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Unrelenting Charge
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Volatile Behavior
card.text: Volatile Behavior deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Wandering Zealot
card.text: {R}, Discard a card: Examine (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Virulent Shower
card.text: Virulent Shower deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. Scry 2.

card.name: Aimless Wanderer
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters or dies, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Unbridled Creation
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, examine. Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each examined card you own. (To examine, exile the top card of your library. You may cast it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Blessed by Nature
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. When enchanted creature dies, you gain 2 life. Return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Blight Maw
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Blooming Sprite
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Blooming Sprite. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Blossom
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Guardian of Harmony
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Burgeoning Harbinger
card.text: Whenever you tap a land for mana, add one mana of any type that land produced. {8}{G}{G}: Create a token that's a copy of Burgeoning Harbinger.

card.name: Curious Remembrance
card.text: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. Draw a card. Exile Curious Remembrance.

card.name: Curious Wanderer
card.text: When this creature dies, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Feast
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the creature an opponent controls would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Fountain of Wisdom
card.text: Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, scry 1. At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card if you control seven or more lands.

card.name: Frolicking Neverfolk
card.text: When this creature enters, examine. If you examined a land, you may put it into your hand. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Harmonic Scholar
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Harmony
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) At the beginning of each upkeep, if you follow the path, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. When this creature dies, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Immense Irregularity
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters or dies, draw a card.

card.name: Imposing Stature
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and gains trample.

card.name: Lost Savior
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Mantra of Harmony
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Target land you control becomes a 3/3 Treefolk creature with haste and vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Neverfolk Hermit
card.text: {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Nourish, the Revitalized
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card for each creature token you control. Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Potence, Wild Preacher
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) This creature gets +1/+1 for each examined card you own. Whenever you play an examined card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Primal Regent
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Vigilance, trample Sacrifice another creature: This creature gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Ravager
card.text: Trample When this creature dies, create two 2/2 red Weird creature tokens.

card.name: Percipience
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Roaming Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Safekeeper
card.text: When this creature dies, you may exile it. When you do, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Solitary Sprite
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Sprouting Burst
card.text: Choose X. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. • Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Stalking Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Reach At the beginning of your end step, untap Stalking Husk if a creature died this turn.

card.name: Staunch Huntsman
card.text: Reach Whenever another creature you control dies, scry 1.

card.name: Terrifying Presence
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by creatures other than target creature this turn.

card.name: Thirsting Neverfolk
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever you play an examined card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Towering Sovereign
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Tracker's Expertise
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Turn to Soil
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. That permanent's controller gains 3 life.

card.name: Unforgiving Predacity
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Voracious Grasp
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then that creature fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Insatiable Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Trample {1}, Sacrifice another creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Yellow Visionary
card.text: When this creature enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Blazing Vanguard
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Call of Harmony
card.text: Search your library for a green creature card and a white creature card, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Chaos Weaver
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant spell, target Weird gains double strike until end of turn. Whenever you cast a sorcery spell, target Weird can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Disarray, the Opposer
card.text: Trample Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, the next spell you cast this turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Festering Druid
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Festering Druid.

card.name: Fiery Inquisitor
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Gliding Watcher
card.text: Flying, vigilance Other creatures with flying you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Hallowed Speaker
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, create a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.) Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, draw a card.

card.name: Impassioned Oracle
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery from your hand, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery from exile, draw a card.

card.name: Insurgent Commander
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Martyr 3 (When this creature dies, you may exile it to return a creature with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Merciless Thaumaturge
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Pitiful End
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Preacher of Unity
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another creature you control enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Soothing Oracle
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature defending player controls. Whenever a creature an opponent controls becomes tapped, scry 1.

card.name: Reverie, the Dreamshaper
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Spells you cast from exile with mana value 5 or greater cost {4} less to cast.

card.name: Vehement Neverfolk
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever you cast an examined spell, this creature can't be blocked this turn by creatures with mana value less than that spell's mana value.

card.name: War Seers
card.text: Flash At the beginning of your end step, if you haven't cast a spell this turn, scry 3.

card.name: Warped Seer
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, each player discards a card. Then you may have each player draw a card.

card.name: World Scholar
card.text: When this creature enters, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) Whenever you cast an examined spell, you may put an examined land you own onto the battlefield.

card.name: Celestial Compass
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Hallowed Halberd
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has menace. Equip {2}

card.name: Locked Sigil
card.text: {T}, Add one mana of any color. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.)

card.name: Righteous Edge
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has hexproof from spells. Equip {2}

card.name: Tome of Memories
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Abyssal Wastes
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {2}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Bog of the Forgotten
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Bog of the Forgotten: Create two 1/1 colorless creature tokens. Activate only as a sorcery. (They have no creature types.)

card.name: Desolate Battleground
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {1}{R}{W}, {T}: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Expendable Husk
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Forgotten Deity
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, for each player, destroy target nonbasic land that player controls.

card.name: Forsaken Champion
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Flying When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Husk Brute
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.)

card.name: Husk Piker
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Whenever this creature and at least two other creatures attack, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}: Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: The Sparkless
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) Activated abilities of planeswalkers can't be activated.

card.name: Twisting Ridge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {2}{U}{R}, {T}, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Create a tapped 2/2 red Weird creature token.

card.name: Unraveling Edge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {2}{G}{U}, {T}: Examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Vacant Seer
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Wretched Woods
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {1}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Herald of Unity
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Teachings of the Forgotten
card.text: Examine three times. (To examine, exile the top card of your library. You may cast it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Gaze Upon the Ensuing
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Champion of Resolve
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) Whenever you draw a card, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Perturbing Reflection
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield or of any creature card in a graveyard.

card.name: Courier of Vision
card.text: Whenever you cast your second instant or sorcery spell this turn, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) This creature has flying as long as you follow the path.

card.name: Ignite, the Spontaneous
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, examine. That card costs {2} less to cast this turn. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.)

card.name: Stalking Spawn
card.text: This creature can't attack unless you've cast a spell with odd mana value this turn or control another permanent with an odd mana value.

card.name: Unity
card.text: When this creature enters, you follow the path. (At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell during your turn, you stop following the path.) Creatures you control get +1/+1 as long as you follow the path. When this creature dies, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Left in Dismay
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 colorless creature token. (It has no creature types.)

card.name: Beheaded, the Nomad
card.text: Beheaded is a 3/3 Warrior creature with indestructible and haste as long as you've activated one of his loyalty abilities this turn. (He doesn't die for having 0 loyalty while he's a creature.) [+1]: Up to one target creature can't block this turn. [-3]: Each opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Reckoning, the Crimson Prophet
card.text: Whenever you discard a card, examine. (Exile the top card of your library. You may play it by paying an additional {2}.) At the beginning of your precombat main phase, you may discard a card. If you do, add {R}{R}.

card.name: Mantra of Vision
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Draw a card. • Copy the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn, you may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Conveyance, Voice of Aether
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, exile an instant or sorcery card chosen at random from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it until the beginning of your next end step. If there are four or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, you may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Paths Untravelled
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Dreamwatcher
card.text: Flying When Dreamwatcher enters the battlefield, mill four cards. Then you may put an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard on top of your library.

card.name: Enduring Vigor
card.text: When this enchantment enters, creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn. Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Fateweaver
card.text: (This creature has no creature types.) {1}{WB}: This creature becomes white and black and its base power and toughness become 3/3. {2}{W}{B}: If this creature is white it becomes a Cleric with lifelink and base power and toughness 5/5. {2}{W}{W}{B}{B}: If this creature is a Cleric put three +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever you gain life this turn, each opponent loses that much life.

card.name: Paragon of Parity
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. This creature and other creatures you control have base power and toughness equal to the number of creatures you control.
